title: peddiea involucrata
intro: Peddiea involucrata, also known as the Yellow Elder, is a tropical tree species native to Jamaica and the Greater Antilles. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Peddiea involucrata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's bark and leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which have been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
